'''zhashara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jockocrat|jockocrat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jockocrat|jockocrat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhashara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæshæræth|zhæshæræth]] || [[word:zhæshæræj|zhæshæræj]] || [[word:zhæshæræsh|zhæshæræsh]] || [[word:zhæshæræ|zhæshæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhashasharath|zhashasharath]] || [[word:zhashasharaj|zhashasharaj]] || [[word:zhashasharash|zhashasharash]] || [[word:zhashashara|zhashashara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhasharath|zhasharath]] || [[word:zhasharaj|zhasharaj]] || [[word:zhasharash|zhasharash]] || [[word:zhashara|zhashara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhashafrath|zhashafrath]] || [[word:zhashafraj|zhashafraj]] || [[word:zhashafrash|zhashafrash]] || [[word:zhashafraf|zhashafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhasharatha|zhasharatha]] || [[word:zhasharaja|zhasharaja]] || [[word:zhasharasha|zhasharasha]] || [[word:zhasharaka|zhasharaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhasharath|zhasharath]] || [[word:zhasharaj|zhasharaj]] || [[word:zhasharash|zhasharash]] || [[word:zhashara|zhashara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhasharathal|zhasharathal]] || [[word:zhasharajal|zhasharajal]] || [[word:zhasharashal|zhasharashal]] || [[word:zhasharakal|zhasharakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhasharathatha|zhasharathatha]] || [[word:zhasharajaja|zhasharajaja]] || [[word:zhasharashasha|zhasharashasha]] || [[word:zhasharaka|zhasharaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhasharathan|zhasharathan]] || [[word:zhasharajan|zhasharajan]] || [[word:zhasharashan|zhasharashan]] || [[word:zhasharakan|zhasharakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhasharathaoro|zhasharathaoro]] || [[word:zhasharajaoro|zhasharajaoro]] || [[word:zhasharashaoro|zhasharashaoro]] || [[word:zhasharakaoro|zhasharakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
